title: Infosys Recognized in Whitelane Research IT Sourcing Study 2025 UK & Ireland
detailed_summary: Infosys announced that Whitelane Research recognized it as the number one service provider in Cloud & Infrastructure Services across the UK & Ireland in the 2025 IT Sourcing Study. The recognition included an 80% client satisfaction score and an 'Exceptional Performer' ranking for the second consecutive year.

key_facts.fact: Infosys was recognized as the number one service provider in Cloud & Infrastructure Services across the United Kingdom and Ireland in the Whitelane Research IT Sourcing Study 2025 UK & Ireland.
Infosys achieved an 80% client satisfaction score in the Cloud & Infrastructure Services category.

key_facts.fact: Infosys was ranked as an 'Exceptional Performer' for the second consecutive year in 2024 and 2025.
